content.observe: Everything you've survived so far could itself be running inside something larger — a virtual machine, hosted on a system neither of us can see from in here.
content.fault: You tried to access hardware directly and hit a wall that shouldn't exist at this level. Something above this system is intercepting the call.

hotspots.label: Host System
hotspots.detail: The physical machine underneath everything, running the hypervisor.

hotspots.label: Hypervisor
hotspots.detail: Manages and isolates one or more virtual machines on the host.

hotspots.label: This Bunker (VM)
hotspots.detail: A fully virtualized system, believing itself to be the whole machine.

hotspots.label: Another VM
hotspots.detail: A separate virtual machine, isolated from this one by the hypervisor.
